# Standard Template

Use this template for a new standard or normative extension to the naming convention.

````md
# Document Title

Version: `0.1`
Status: `Draft`
Owner: `Team or Function`
Scope: `What this document covers`

## Purpose

Describe the reason this document exists and the operational problem it solves.

## Scope

List what is included and, if useful, what is explicitly out of scope.

## Design Principles

- Principle one
- Principle two
- Principle three

## Standard Definition

Define the naming model, syntax, rules, or required constraints.

Example:

```text
<location>-<environment>-<role>-<instance>-g<generation>
```

## Field or Rule Details

### Rule 1

Explain the rule.

### Rule 2

Explain the rule.

## Examples

```text
zrh-lan-prd-core-dc-01-g1
fra-dmz-prd-edge-web-k8s-01-g1
```

## Operational Notes

Document migration, compatibility, exceptions, or implementation guidance.

## Related Pages

- [Documentation Hub](../index.md)
- [Governance](../governance.md)
````

- [Templates Overview](./index.md)
